metadata.title: DeutschTest.pro — AI Simulator for the Goethe-Zertifikat
metadata.description: Prepare for the Goethe-Zertifikat with AI-generated exams. Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen — all on one platform.

hero.subtitle: Realistic exam simulation with AI-generated tasks, automatic scoring and detailed feedback.
hero.subtitleGuest: Sign up and get a free test.
hero.subtitleFreeAvailable: Your free trial test is waiting for you.
hero.subtitlePaidTests: {count, plural, one {You have # test available.} other {You have # tests available.}}
hero.modulesHint: 💡 Pick a single module for focused practice. 1 credit = 1 module.
hero.buyPrompt: You've already used your free test. Buy more tests to keep going.
hero.loadingHint: Generating the module — please wait a moment…

errors.noCredits: You have no module credits left. Please buy more credits.
errors.generateFailed: Couldn't generate the exam. Please try again in a bit.

features.title: All four modules. One platform.
features.subtitle: Every module follows the Goethe-Zertifikat format exactly.

lesen.title: Lesen
lesen.description: AI-generated reading texts with multiple-choice and true/false tasks — just like the real Goethe-Zertifikat.

horen.title: Hören
horen.description: Professionally voiced listening texts with realistic voices. No rewinding — just like the real exam.

schreiben.title: Schreiben
schreiben.description: Writing tasks with AI scoring based on official criteria: task fulfillment, coherence, vocabulary, grammar.

sprechen.title: Sprechen
sprechen.description: Oral exam with voice recording and AI analysis. Pronunciation, fluency and grammar are all scored.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

probe.name: Trial
probe.description: Try the platform with one free trial exam.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Unlimited exams with detailed AI feedback.

realism.a: Our AI generates tasks that match the official Goethe-Zertifikat format and difficulty exactly. Format, timing and scoring criteria are replicated 1:1.

levels.a: Right now we support A1 (Start Deutsch 1), A2 (Goethe-Zertifikat A2) and B1 (Goethe-Zertifikat B1). More levels are coming.

aiScoring.a: Lesen and Hören are scored automatically. For Schreiben and Sprechen the AI analyzes your answers against the official Goethe criteria and gives detailed feedback.

singleModules.a: Yes — you can take a full exam or practice any single module (Lesen, Hören, Schreiben or Sprechen) on its own.

microphone.q: Do I need a microphone for the Sprechen module?
microphone.a: Yes, the Sprechen module needs a mic. Most laptops and phones have a built-in one that works fine.

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create your DeutschTest.pro account
register.passwordHint: We'll send a confirmation email so you can verify your address.
register.successBody: We sent a confirmation email to {email}. Open the link in it to activate your account.
register.successBonus: After you confirm, you'll get 3 free modules to try the platform. Check your spam folder too.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

pricing.title: Buy tests
pricing.subtitle: Pick the right pack for your exam prep. Every test includes all modules: Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen.
pricing.freeAvailable: You still have a free test available!
pricing.paidAvailable: {count, plural, one {You have # test available.} other {You have # tests available.}}
pricing.footnote: Secure checkout. All prices include VAT. Tests are valid for 30 days.

overview.subtitle: Your personal learning space — stats and new exams.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Your balance, purchase options and payment history.
payments.creditExplanation: 1 credit is one exam module (Lesen, Hören, Schreiben or Sprechen).
payments.buyHint: Pick a package — purchased modules can be used freely across Lesen, Hören, Schreiben and Sprechen.
payments.historyHint: Payment history will show up once the payment system is live.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: Email can't be changed right now.

password.title: Change password
password.externalText: You signed in with an external provider (like Google). Your password is managed by that provider.
password.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.hint: Your account and all related data will be permanently removed.
delete.modalBody: To delete your account, please email us at <email>contact@deutschtest.pro</email>.
delete.modalHint: We confirm deletions manually to prevent accidental requests.

placeholder.soonHint: We're working on the next stage of your account.

timer.timeUpMessage: Your answers are being submitted automatically.

audio.scriptHeader: Audio {id} — {count, plural, one {# play} other {# plays}}

teil1.title: Teil 1
teil1.desc: Read the text and the tasks. Are the statements true or false?

teil2.title: Teil 2
teil2.desc: Read the text and the tasks. Choose the right answer: a, b or c.

teil3.title: Teil 3
teil3.desc: Read the text and the tasks. Choose Ja or Nein.

teil4.title: Teil 4
teil4.desc: Read the texts and the situations. Which text fits?

teil5.title: Teil 5
teil5.desc: Read the text and choose the right word for each gap.

teil1.title: Teil 1
teil1.desc: You'll hear five short texts. Each text plays twice. True or false?

teil2.title: Teil 2
teil2.desc: You'll hear a conversation. The text plays once. Choose a, b or c.

teil3.title: Teil 3
teil3.desc: You'll hear a conversation. The text plays once. True or false?

teil4.title: Teil 4
teil4.desc: You'll hear five short conversations. Each text plays twice. True or false?

sprechen.clickToStart: Click the button to start recording.

errors.aggregate: No scorable recordings — please redo the parts that failed.

planning.title: Teil 1 — Plan something together
planning.desc: Talk about the points below and plan together.

presentation.title: Teil 2 — Present a topic
presentation.desc: Give a short presentation based on the bullet points on the slides.

reaction.title: Teil 3 — React to a presentation
reaction.desc: Respond to the question and explain your opinion.

results.title: Results
results.notSubmitted: The exam hasn't been submitted yet.
